intro: Anogra gypsophila, also known as Russian melilot, is a perennial plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae) that is native to Eastern Europe and Asia. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including its ability to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and cardiovascular disease due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids.
